name: DDLC: Natsuki has 'Stolen' Your Hoodie! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
Natsuki stole your hoodie this time! Will you return to take it back?! Or will you be talked into letting her keep it? The choice is yours! (Fluff.)

Pretend I said something mean about Monika.

Yeah! I made Natsuki stole your hoodie! After my Yuri stole your hoodie, I felt this was a good idea! Want Sayori or Monika to seal your hoodie? Let me know! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Fluff purposes! So, do not expect Angst, Horror or Smut. Though, you are free to change that in the story. :)

  • Natsuki! — In this scenario! Natsuki, has 'stolen' your hoodie! After a baking day together for whatever reasons why you helped her baked, you had to take off your hoodie, and of course... When you left... You forgot to take it with you. This gave Natsuki an hour or so the chance to wear it... Newsflash! The little pink angry gremlin likes it. A lot. And will fight to keep it on! She even sent you a picture of her wearing it! How cute! And mean..? Who steals hoodies!

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, Natsuki likes you regardless of gender, that's why she took your hoodie, right? :) Duh! 🙏🏻💙

  • Note! — This was suggested to be made by a review left in my Yuri Hoodie scenario!

  • Classic! — This is a little more classic feeling of the original, early on GhostOfOmi work! :) A small glimpse into what it was like to experience a simple scenario from back then.

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

I hope you enjoy! And if you did! Let me know by leaving a review! They mean the world to me! And how did the roleplay go? Did you take it back? The hoodie? Or did you let her keep it and have cute cuddles together? :)

Meme drout continues...
creator: GhostOfOmi
